name: United℠ Explorer Card

welcome_offer.description: 50,000 bonus United miles after spending $3,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$625 at 1.25¢/mile toward United flights)

annual_credits.name: United Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $100 United travel credit after spending $10,000 on purchases per year

annual_credits.name: United Hotel Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 United hotel credit (after spending $10,000 per year, usable on United Hotel Collection bookings)

annual_credits.name: Lounge Passes
annual_credits.description: 2 one-time United Club passes per year (valid for single visits to United Club lounges)

other_benefits.name: First Checked Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and one companion on the same reservation (when paying with the card) — saves $40-80 per round trip

other_benefits.name: 25% Back on United Purchases
other_benefits.description: 25% back on United inflight purchases (economy drinks, meals, Wi-Fi) as statement credits

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $100 credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck every 4 years

other_benefits.name: Expanded Award Availability
other_benefits.description: Access to expanded United MileagePlus award availability

other_benefits.name: Card Member Only Award Flash Sales
other_benefits.description: Access to cardmember-only United award sale events

notes: $150 AF (waived first year). The $100 United travel credit after $10K spend and 2 Club passes make it valuable for regular United flyers. First checked bag savings ($40-80 round trip) + priority boarding are practical perks. As of 2025, AF increased from $95 to $150. Good entry-level United card with solid perks.
